===[[Pokémon Masters EX]]===
<!--{{main|Katy (Masters)}}-->
Katy appears as an [[Non-player character|NPC]] in [[Pokémon Masters EX]]<!-- and forms a [[sync pair]] with her {{p|Ursaring}}, which is capable of [[Terastal phenomenon#Pokémon Masters EX|Sync Terastallizing]] into a {{t|Bug}} type-->. She made her debut in the [[story event]] [[Dressed to Give Thanks]], where she gives {{mas|Rika}} advice about what to do for Palentine's Day.
